  "findings": [
    "Control wiring is routed in the same raceway as VFD power wiring, violating separation requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate and reroute the control wiring into a separate, dedicated conduit or raceway.",
    "Verify that shielded control cables are used and grounded in accordance with manufacturer specifications."
  ],
  "rationale": "Routing sensitive control wiring in the same raceway as high-frequency, high-voltage VFD output power wiring induces electromagnetic interference (EMI/RFI), leading to erratic motor behavior, control signal corruption, and potential equipment damage. This violates both NEC separation rules (such as NEC 300.3(C) and Class 1/2/3 circuit separation in NEC 725) and manufacturer installation manuals.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 300.3(C)",
    "NEC 725.136",
    "NEC 430",
    "VFD Manufacturer Installation Manuals"
  ]
}
